[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Its fun"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Gunplay is fine"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "content is there"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "technically it’s no longer on life support"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Specialists still feel wrong"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Matches feel chaotic in a weird way"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Do not buy this game if you don't want to turn on secure boot"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "CSM (one of the things you need to turn on) destroys your performance"}, {"aspect": "cheating", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it does literally nothing to prevent cheating"}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "EA's stupid decisions"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "It's a waste of money"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "good but eventually boring"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "building up your tavern and managing the customers and stock levels was very enjoyable"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "tedious quest system"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "worth the price if its on a discount"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "Took 15 hours to 100%"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nice music"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "really relaxing game"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "relaxing game"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very Addicting"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "research and quest aspects to be broken"}, {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Many of the researches were very so-so- rewards"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "assigned permanently to the new kitchen or bar you built, great, but also assigned to every floor???"}, {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I think they wanted a balanced game and it sort of isn't"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I think it was a grind and not super fun to get there"}]},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the villians are incredibly shallow"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the game doesn't delve into especially novel or controversial angles on power dynamics"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Morgana never changes, he never stops being a creep"}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the music is fire"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the story is great"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the characters are memorable"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the gameplay is good"}]},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Slow start"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Finishing the game feels like a true end of an era"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The soundtrack is phenomenal"}]},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I have the freedom to go to any planet"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "romance my companions"}]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "get rid of the loading screens"}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "look for fun and you'll find it"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it's gotten better over the years and since the last DLC and patch"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "full of procedurally generated crap"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "soulless randomly generated nothing"}]}]
